name: Google Drive Document Summarizer to Notion
description: Lists files from Google Drive, uses Claude AI to summarize document contents, and saves structured summaries to Notion with properly chunked blocks (max 1900 chars). Posts a completion notification to Slack.

source.originalName: Transcribe audio files, summarize with GPT-4, and store in Notion

driveKey.description: Google Drive connection key for listing files

notionKey.description: Notion connection key for saving summaries

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for completion notification

notionParentPageId.description: Notion parent page ID where summaries will be saved

driveFolderId.description: Google Drive folder ID to list files from (default: root)

fileTypes.description: Types of files to summarize (e.g. 'documents and spreadsheets', 'PDFs', 'all files')

steps.name: Compile file metadata for AI analysis
Build Notion page blocks from AI summary
